scripts.zip_journeys_bf: cat ./scripts/betfair/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/betfair/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-betfair-custTribe-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -xr!data/fss  -x!data/BFUsernames.csv -x!data/PPUsernames.csv -x!transactions.yml"
scripts.zip_journeys_pp: cat ./scripts/paddypower/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/paddypower/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-paddypower-custTribe-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -xr!data/fss  -x!data/BFUsernames.csv -x!data/PPUsernames.csv -x!transactions.yml"

scripts.zip_fss_journeys_bf: cat ./scripts/betfair/fss/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/betfair/fss/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-betfair-custTribe-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -x!transactions.yml"
scripts.zip_journey_logout_bf: cat ./scripts/betfair/logout/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/betfair/logout/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-betfair-logout-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -x!transactions.yml"

scripts.zip_journey_login_bf: cat ./scripts/betfair/login/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/betfair/login/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-betfair-login-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -x!transactions.yml"
scripts.zip_journey_login_pp: cat ./scripts/paddypower/login/parameters.yml > parameters.yml && find ./scripts/paddypower/login/journeys/ -name '*.yml' -type f | xargs -I {} sh -c "cat {} > rts.yml; 7z a -r -tzip zips/{}-paddypower-login-journey.zip * -xr!legacy -xr!zips -xr!logs -x!transactions.yml"

scripts.zip_all: npm run zip_journeys_bf && npm run zip_journeys_pp && npm run zip_onpremise_journeys_bf && npm run zip_onpremise_journeys_pp && npm run zip_journey_login_bf && npm run zip_journey_login_pp
